strategy_summary: A specialized claw of the pistol shrimp creates a localized pressure wave by bubble collapse. “This process is known as cavitation, and the energy generated by it almost defies belief; the collapsing gas bubbles create explosive plasma balls that, for an instant, reach 5000 C – almost the temperature of the Sun.”…
mechanism:
A specialized claw of the pistol shrimp creates a localized pressure wave by bubble collapse.

“This process is known as cavitation, and the energy generated by it almost defies belief; the collapsing gas bubbles create explosive plasma balls that, for an instant, reach 5000 C – almost the temperature of the Sun.” (Downer 2002)
